titleStmt.title: SII 26.693: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 693. (A.R. No. 647 of 1909.) KŌNĒRIRĀJAPURAM, THANJAVUR TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Tribhº Śrī-Kulōttuṅgachōḷadēva I: Year 49, Mēsha (Chittirai), śu. 13, Wednesday, Uttiram = 1119 A.D., March 26.

summary.p: This incomplete inscription is damaged in some places. It contains the praśasti of the king commencing with Pugaḻmādu viḷaṅga, etc.

It records the decision of the government communicated to the Peruṁguṟi of Tirunallam, a Brahmadēyam in Veṇṇāḍu in Pūvālakulavalli-vaḷanāḍu, through Śembiyadaraiyar working under Muṉaiyadaraiyar, that land and houses of such families of the village which had not paid the taxes for the 49th year and had left the village, should be reserved by the sabhai and should be sold to others. It also records the sale of some such land and house (details lost).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu
virumpa nilamakaḷ vaḷara malar makaḷ puṇara
urimaiyiṟ ciṟan=ta maṇimuṭi cūṭi mīnavar ni
laikeṭa villavar kulaitara Ēna mannavar Iṭu
tiṟai Iṭattuk kaṇaittun tan cakkaranaṭā
tti virasiṅhāsanattu Ulakuṭai
ntaruḷiya korājake
caripanmarāna dhiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī
kulottuṅkacoḻadevarkku Iyāṇ
ṭu nāṟpattoṉpatāvatu meṣanāyaṟṟu pūrvva
pakṣattu Uttiramum putaṉkiḻamaiyum pe
ṟṟa trayōtaci nāṟṟu pūvālakulavalli vaḷa
nāṭṭu veṇṇāṭṭu prahmateyan tirunala
ttu peruṅkuṟi mahāsabhaiyom
muṉaiyataraiyar kiḻ kūṟuceykiṟa cem
piyataraiyar kaṭaiyīṭu van=tamaiyil
yāṇṭu nāṟpattonpatāvatu pūvā
lakulavalli vaḷanāṭṭu veṇṇāṭ
ṭu brahmateya ntirunalattu sabhaiyār
kāṇa paṇikka cempiyataraiyan Aṟi
tattāvatu taṅkaḷūr yāṇṭu nāṟpatto
npatāvatu Iṟai Iṟāte kuṭu yoṭipo
nār nilaṅkaḷum maṉaikaḷum sabhai vi
laiyāka koṇṭu maṟṟārku
vilaikkācu Oṭiponavaṉ peril mai
yile cilavu peṟa kuṇṭikaiyi ṭṭu
taravu koḷḷappaṇṇuvate koḷvā
rillaiyākil pūṇaippaṭṭār melu
Aṭaippu mutavi perilum peru vilaikku
vilaiyāka viṟṟu kuṭuttu viṟṟavilai
kkācu kuUnfinished.
Digital edition of SII 26.693 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
